verification.phase12_note: scripts/s168_verify_phases.sh phase12 gate checks bki_sales_naming_series wiring in commissary.py / billing.py, which is agent-schema territory. agent-seed Phase 12 deliverable is the per-store cost center seed script (scripts/s168_seed_cost_centers.py), which is not gated by phase 12 in the verify script.

design_notes: All scripts run inside Frappe backend container; designed for SSM runner pattern from s163_run_ssm_ops.py.
Customer + cost-center scripts read CSVs from /tmp (overridable via S168_REGISTER_CSV / S168_TIN_RDO_CSV) -- the SSM runner must docker cp the two source CSVs into the container before invoking.

Phase 13 (EWT) is no-op REUSE per ICT-004: existing default_ewt_rate / ewt_payable_account / default_vat_rate fields are reused. The new toggle bki_ewt_on_store_sales_enabled is owned by agent-schema (BEI Settings JSON). s168_configure_bei_settings.py verifies the existing fields are present and reports phase13 status.
Customer custom fields custom_vat_status / custom_bir_rdo_code are written ONLY if the field exists on the Customer DocType (avoids hard dependency on Phase 1 fixture order).
GL account script writes phase5_account_confirmation.txt to sites/output/s168/ inside the container per plan Task 5.3.
Known TIN exception (Everyday Delight Food Ventures Inc.) handled as WARNING-skip per plan.
not_run: Scripts are deploy-ready but were NOT executed by agent-seed; Sam runs them via SSM in Session A deploy.
